commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Discord-only fallback that maps unmatched non-default accountId values to same-named agents and adds resolver tests for the positive and default-account cases.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main passes Discord accountId into resolveAgentRoute and falls through to the default route when explicit binding tiers miss; the PR-introduced no-agent phantom route follows from pickFirstExistingAgentId returning sanitized input when no agents exist.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer routing-policy approval and contributor-provided real Discord proof before automated repair or replacement work is useful.

target.title: fix(routing): map discord account IDs to matching agents
target.author: aworki
